basic_details.job_title: HLL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Walk in for 146 Dialysis Technician, Staff Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: HLL Lifecare Limited (HLL), A Government of India Enterprise under Ministry of Health & Family Welfare
basic_details.post_name: Senior Dialysis Technician, Dialysis Technician, Staff Nurse, Central Project Coordinator, QA Coordinator-Dialysis, Lab Technician, Junior Lab Technician, Account Assistant, IT Officer
basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare Limited (HLL) has published the Recruitment Notification 2026 on 03 June 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 146 positions including Senior Dialysis Technician, Dialysis Technician, Staff Nurse, Central Project Coordinator, QA Coordinator-Dialysis, Lab Technician, Junior Lab Technician, Account Assistant, and IT Officer posts under its Healthcare Services Division (HCS) in Maharashtra on Fixed Term Contract basis. Candidates with relevant qualifications such as GNM, BSc Nursing, Diploma, BSc, MSc, B.Com, BE/B.Tech, MCA are eligible to attend the Walk-in Selection. The Walk-in

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for all posts is 37 years as on 01.06.2026. Age relaxation will be applicable for SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer)/PwD candidates as per Government of India rules.

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: Diploma course in Medical Dialysis Technology/ Renal Dialysis Technology OR BSc (Medical Dialysis Technology/ Renal Dialysis Technology) OR MSc (Medical Dialysis Technology/ Renal Dialysis Technology)

Certificate course in Medical Dialysis Technology OR Diploma course in Medical Dialysis Technology/Renal Dialysis Technology OR BSc (Medical Dialysis Technology/Renal Dialysis Technology) OR MSc (Medical Dialysis Technology Renal Dialysis Technology)

MSc (Medical Dialysis Technology/ MSc Renal Dialysis Technology)/ MBA (Healthcare/Hospital Administration) with BSc Medical Dialysis Technology/ Masters of Public Health with BSc Medical Dialysis Technology / Masters of Public Health with BSc Renal Dialysis Technology OR BSc Medical Dialysis Technology/ BSc Renal Dialysis Technology/BE (Biomedical Engineering)/ B Tech (Biomedical Engineering)
MSc-DT OR BSc-DT OR Diploma DT (2 years) MSBTE approved
MSc Computer Science / MBA (IT Systems) / BSc Computer Science / BE / B.Tech (Computer Science/IT) / MCA

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of walk-in selection. The prescribed educational qualification should have been obtained from a Recognized University / Educational Institution on a full-time basis. Only candidates meeting the prescribed qualification and experience criteria will be permitted to attend the selection process. | Educational Qualification & Experience

vacancy_details.Place of Vacancy: Pune, Nashik, Aurangabad, Amravati, Nagpur, Latur, Kolhapur, Mumbai

selection_process: Senior Dialysis Technician, Dialysis Technician, Staff Nurse, Central Project Coordinator, QA Coordinator-Dialysis, Lab Technician, Junior Lab Technician, Account Assistant Skill Test followed by Written Test (MCQ, 50 marks, 30 minutes, No Negative Marking)
IT Officer & Account Assistant Written Test only (MCQ, 50 marks, 30 minutes, No Negative Marking)
The selection process for HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026 consists of a Skill Test followed by a Written Test for most positions. For IT Officer and Account Assistant posts

the selection will consist of a Written Test only. The Written Test for all positions will consist of multiple-choice questions (MCQs) to be completed within 30 minutes. The maximum marks for the Written Test will be 50
and there will be no negative marking for incorrect answers. Only those candidates who qualify in the Skill Test will be eligible to appear for the Written Test.
how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates must attend the walk-in selection process at the respective venue on the scheduled date and time (10:00 AM to 12:30 PM). The prescribed application format may be downloaded from the official website: www.lifecarehll.com/careers. Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. The appointment will be on a Fixed Term Contract basis.
Documents to be Produced at the Time of Walk-in (Originals + Self-Attested Copies):
Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets
SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates shall produce Community Certificate issued by the competent Revenue Authority

Candidates who fail to produce the required original documents will not be permitted to participate in the selection process. Applications not in the prescribed format or incomplete in any respect are liable to be rejected.
For Any Further Clarification, Please Contact: Contact – 022-20870668 / Email – [email protected]
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. The appointment will be on a Fixed Term Contract basis. The prescribed application format may be downloaded from www.lifecarehll.com/careers. Age relaxation will be applicable for SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer)/PwD candidates as per Government of India rules. Candidates are required to bring all original certificates along with self-attested copies for verification. Candidates who fail to produce the required original documents will not be permitted to participate in the selection process. The place of posting may vary depending on organizational requirements; Management reserves the right to decide the final place of posting. Only candidates meeting the prescribed qualification and experience criteria will be permitted to attend the selection process. Applications not in the prescribed format or incomplete in any respect are liable to be rejected; no further communication in this regard will be entertained. The number of vacancies may vary depending upon organizational requirements. In the event of a large number of applications being received, the Management reserves the right to shortlist candidates based on higher qualifications, experience, or any other criteria deemed appropriate. Canvassing in any form will be treated as a disqualification. Management reserves the right to cancel, restrict, modify, alter, or enlarge the recruitment process, if required, without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 146 vacancies have been announced under HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026 across 9 positions including Senior Dialysis Technician (25), Dialysis Technician (75), Staff Nurse (30), Central Project Coordinator (3), QA Coordinator-Dialysis (8), Lab Technician (1), Junior Lab Technician (2), Account Assistant (1), and IT Officer (1). The number of vacancies is subject to change depending on organizational requirements.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in selection schedule for HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in selection for HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026 will be held from 07 June 2026 to 14 June 2026 at various venues across Maharashtra. Candidates must report between 10:00 AM and 12:30 PM on the scheduled date at the respective venue for their preferred location/post.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates do not need to apply online. They must directly attend the walk-in selection at the designated venue on the scheduled date with the prescribed application form (downloadable from www.lifecarehll.com/careers) and all required original documents along with self-attested copies. No other mode of application will be accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 37 years as on 01.06.2026. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) and PwD candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For most posts (Senior Dialysis Technician, Dialysis Technician, Staff Nurse, Central Project Coordinator, QA Coordinator-Dialysis, Lab Technician, Junior Lab Technician), the selection process consists of a Skill Test followed by a Written Test. For IT Officer and Account Assistant, the selection is through a Written Test only. The Written Test consists of MCQs of 50 marks to be completed in 30 minutes with no negative marking.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for the HLL Lifecare Limited walk-in selection?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents along with self-attested copies, including: proof of age, educational qualification certificates and mark sheets, experience certificates, latest salary certificate with break-up, Aadhaar and PAN Card, recent passport-size photograph, and community certificate for SC/ST/OBC (NCL) candidates. Candidates who fail to produce original documents will not be permitted to participate.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum qualification required for the Dialysis Technician post in HLL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For the Dialysis Technician post, candidates must have a Certificate course, Diploma, BSc, or MSc in Medical Dialysis Technology / Renal Dialysis Technology from a recognized institution. The required experience varies from a minimum of 2 years (for MSc holders) to 7 years (for Certificate course holders) of relevant post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the pay scale for HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026 posts?
faq.answer: The basic pay range varies by post: Senior Dialysis Technician (Rs. 14000-32500), Dialysis Technician (Rs. 11500-23000), Staff Nurse (Rs. 9500-19000), Central Project Coordinator (Rs. 13000-30000), QA Coordinator-Dialysis (Rs. 13000-30000), Lab Technician (Rs. 11500-23000), Junior Lab Technician (Rs. 10000-20000), Account Assistant (Rs. 10000-20000), and IT Officer (Rs. 12000-29500). Actual remuneration will be based on qualifications, experience, and domain expertise.

faq.question: Q9. Is the HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026 a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No. The appointment under HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026 will be on a Fixed Term Contract basis only. It is not a permanent government job. HLL Lifecare Limited is a Mini Ratna Central Public Sector Enterprise (Government of India Enterprise) under the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I get further clarification about HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For any further clarification regarding HLL Lifecare Limited Recruitment 2026, candidates can contact the recruitment team at Phone: 022-20870668 or Email: [email protected]. Candidates should also regularly check the official website at www.lifecarehll.com for updates and the official notification PDF.
